```{python}
#| include: false
import yaml

# Load resume data
with open('/Users/shakes/DevProjects/jobsearch/templates/resume/data/resume-data.yml', 'r') as f:
    resume_data = yaml.safe_load(f)

personal = resume_data['personal']
experience = resume_data['experience']
education = resume_data['education']
skills = resume_data['skills']
```

#set text(font: "New Computer Modern", size: 11pt)
#set page(margin: (top: 1.5cm, bottom: 1.5cm, left: 1.5cm, right: 1.5cm))

#align(center)[
  #text(size: 20pt, weight: "bold")[`{python} personal['firstname']` `{python} personal['lastname']`]
  
  #text(size: 14pt)[`{python} personal['positions'][0]`]
  
  #v(0.5em)
  
  #text(size: 10pt)[
    `{python} personal['email']` | `{python} personal['phone']` | `{python} personal['address']`
    
    LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/`{python} personal['linkedin']` | GitHub: github.com/`{python} personal['github']`
  ]
]

#line(length: 100%, stroke: 1pt)

#v(1em)

*`{python} resume_data['summary']['default']`*

#v(1em)

= Experience

```{python}
#| output: asis
for exp in experience:
    print(f"""
*{exp['title']}* | {exp['company']} | {exp['location']} | {exp['date']}
""")
    
    for bullet in exp['bullets']:
        # Clean up bullet text for Typst
        text = bullet['text'].replace('$', '\\$')
        print(f"- {text}")
    
    print()
```

= Education

```{python}
#| output: asis
for edu in education:
    print(f"""
*{edu['degree']}* | {edu['school']} | {edu['location']} | {edu['date']}
""")
    
    if 'notes' in edu:
        notes_str = " | ".join(edu['notes'])
        print(f"- {notes_str}")
    
    print()
```

= Skills

```{python}
#| output: asis
for category, skill_list in skills.items():
    category_name = category.replace('_', ' ').title()
    skills_str = ', '.join(skill_list)
    print(f"*{category_name}:* {skills_str}")
    print()
```
